div.h1: Tensor Quantization: Symmetric vs Asymmetric Ranges

g.title: Preferred for weights to simplify MAC unit logic.
Optimized for non-negative data like ReLU outputs.

ul.li: Optimization: Zero-point addition is omitted in hardware.
Unused Value: -128 is typically ignored to maintain symmetry.
Full Range: Map all 256 levels of INT8/UINT8.
Efficiency: Ideal for skewed data (e.g., Sigmoid/ReLU).
Overhead: Requires ALU to add Z before accumulation.

g.title: Preferred for weights to simplify MAC unit logic.
Optimized for non-negative data like ReLU outputs.
